scene.scenePrompt: Urban fantasy concept art, vertical composition. A opulent tea hall with dark wood paneling and deep red velvet drapes, warm candlelight casting long shadows. A charismatic figure stands center frame, offering a delicate teacup toward the camera with a serene, perfect smile, his eyes meeting the viewer's with an unsettling depth. Behind him, the air shimmers with an expanding, dark crimson demonic ripple, a subtle, pulsating distortion in the background. Soft, warm lighting from chandeliers contrasts with the ominous, cold red glow from the unfolding magic. The atmosphere is tense, suspenseful, a moment poised on the edge of action.

beats.narration: Your white-gloved hand trembles slightly. The silver tray is cold, but your palm is already slick with sweat. On your retinal HUD, the dark red ripples on Wang Zhenhong's back are spreading greedily, writhing like a living thing. Smiling, he hands a steaming cup of black tea to you.
beats.speaker: Wang Zhenhong
beats.line: Jiang Chen, you've been working very hard. This cup of tea is your reward.
beats.lineDelivery: His tone is excessively gentle, the curve of his lips perfect, but there is a hint of inhuman emptiness deep in his eyes

activeCharacters.name: Wang Zhenhong
activeCharacters.pose: Holding the teacup, smiling perfectly, with an inhuman emptiness deep in his eyes

beats.narration: Your fingertips curl beneath your glove, touching the exorcism salt crystals hidden in your palm. HUD countdown: 0.5 seconds. The crystal chandeliers in the tea room are dazzling, and the guests are chatting and laughing, oblivious to this deadly smile and scalding trap.
beats.speaker: You

activeCharacters.name: Wang Zhenhong
activeCharacters.pose: Smiling unchanged, waiting for you to take the cup

choices.label: Take the cup and flick the salt
Let your hand slip and knock over the cup
Bow politely to decline and step back

beats.narration: You reach out and take the teacup. The cup is scalding hot, heat instantly penetrating your glove. In the 0.1 seconds of contact between your finger and the handle, your thumb gently flicks—salt crystals, invisible to the naked eye, scatter like dust onto the tea's surface, rippling into a barely perceptible silver ring.
beats.speaker: You

activeCharacters.name: Wang Zhenhong
activeCharacters.pose: His smile suddenly freezes, his pupils contracting slightly

beats.narration: The teacup slips from your hand! Scalding black tea splashes onto the back of your hand, bringing a sharp sting of pain, but you also see—wherever the tea splashes, dark red veins writhe violently beneath the skin of Wang Zhenhong's hand, letting out a silent shriek.

activeCharacters.name: Wang Zhenhong
activeCharacters.pose: Staring at the spilled tea, his smile gone, his face turning grim

beats.narration: You take half a step back and bow. This movement leaves Wang Zhenhong's outstretched hand frozen in mid-air. Guests cast puzzled glances. Lin Wei stops in her tracks in the distance, her sharp gaze cutting toward you. Wang Zhenhong's smile slowly fades as he pulls the teacup back, his grip tightening.

activeCharacters.name: Wang Zhenhong
activeCharacters.pose: Pulling the teacup back, his smile gone, his face grim

activeCharacters.name: Lin Wei
activeCharacters.pose: Stopping in the distance, looking over with a sharp gaze

beats.narration: The dark red ripples on Wang Zhenhong's back suddenly retract, as if stung by some invisible force. A faint, inhuman grunt escapes his throat. The next second, he regains his gentle, refined smile and turns to face the guests.
beats.speaker: Wang Zhenhong
beats.line: Everyone, tea will be served shortly. I shall check on the desserts in the kitchen.
beats.lineDelivery: His tone is normal, but as he turns, a cold glance sweeps over you from the corner of his eye

activeCharacters.name: Wang Zhenhong
activeCharacters.pose: Turning around, smiling normally, with a cold gaze

characters.name: Wang Zhenhong
characters.voiceDescription: Male, around 28 years old. His voice is deep and steady with a hint of restrained magnetism. He is calm and reserved but decisive and powerful at critical moments. His speaking pace is medium-slow, with clear and forceful pronunciation in standard Mandarin. His character tone is a blend of a reliable, elite butler and a secret agent, occasionally revealing an unquestionable authority in key lines.
characters.visualDescription: A charismatic, handsome modern man in his late 20s, short neat dark brown hair with subtle silver streaks, intense calm blue-grey eyes, sharp jawline, wearing a perfectly tailored black three-piece suit with a subtle dark teal pinstripe pattern, a crisp white dress shirt, and a thin silver chain holding a small, intricate pendant, overall aura of composed elegance, hidden supernatural power, and sharp professionalism.

characters.name: Lin Wei
characters.voiceDescription: Female, around 24 years old. Her voice is clear and calm, with a mature and intellectual quality. Her speaking pace is steady and restrained, with clear articulation in standard Mandarin. She is composed and decisive, occasionally showing a subtle, hard-to-detect concern.
characters.visualDescription: Young adult woman, early 20s, long straight black hair with subtle cyan highlights, serene and intelligent gaze, sharp but soft facial features, wearing a tailored black suit with cyan magical circuit patterns and a high collar, exuding an aura of calm competence and hidden power, urban fantasy concept art style, vertical composition.

storyState.logline: You are an undercover butler and a Hidden Realm agent. You must perform an invisible exorcism right before everyone's eyes at your employer's tea party—and the demon is hiding in the very cup of tea he poured for you.
storyState.genreTags: Urban Fantasy / Suspense & Twists / Fast-Paced Drama / Undercover Agent
storyState.protagonist: You are Jiang Chen. On the surface, you are a perfect butler who just started a week ago, but in reality, you are Agent 742 of the 'Hidden Realm Administration'. You are currently stuck at the private tea party of your employer, Mr. Wang Zhenhong. This billionaire was possessed by the demon 'Silent Shadow' three hours ago, and you must complete the exorcism before he serves tea to the VIP guests. Your weakness: This is your first time executing a 'living possession' mission alone. Any slip-up could result in your employer's death, mission failure, and the exposure of your identity.
storyState.castNotes:
Wang Zhenhong: On the surface, a gentle and refined tech billionaire, but in reality, he is possessed by the demon 'Silent Shadow', and his words and actions are gradually warping. He is your employer, currently carrying tea toward the VIP seats.
Lin Wei: Wang Zhenhong's capable female secretary. She is overly enthusiastic toward you with an inquiring gaze, seemingly knowing the secret beneath your butler identity. She is mingling through the tea party and could approach you at any moment.
Old Chen: Wang Zhenhong's private chef. A man of few words who always appears near you at critical moments. The way he looks at you carries a certain ancient scrutiny.
storyState.synopsis: At the tea party, the employer Wang Zhenhong hands a cup of black tea, suspected of harboring a demon, to his butler Jiang Chen. The moment Jiang Chen takes the cup, he uses exorcism salt to complete the first seal (or knocks over the cup due to a slip / refuses to take the cup). After showing an abnormal reaction, Wang Zhenhong temporarily leaves the guest area.
openThreads: Why was Wang Zhenhong possessed? How effective is the first seal of the exorcism salt?
Has Lin Wei realized Jiang Chen's identity as an agent? Is she friend or foe?
What is Old Chen's connection to the demon 'Silent Shadow'?
How will Wang Zhenhong strike back next? How will the tea party and dinner banquet proceed?
relationships: Wang Zhenhong: The possessing demon has become wary and hostile toward Jiang Chen, though he still maintains his employer persona on the surface.
Lin Wei: Having witnessed the anomaly, her probing of Jiang Chen shifts from the shadows to direct questioning.
Old Chen: Has not yet appeared, but his trait of 'always appearing at critical moments' may be triggered soon.
storyState.nextHook: Next Scene: In the shadows of the side door, Lin Wei stops Jiang Chen and questions him in a low voice. Jiang Chen must deal with this secretary who might know everything, while staying on guard against Wang Zhenhong's next move.

worldSetting:
This is an AI interactive story game targeted at a [Male-oriented] audience, featuring intense dramatic conflicts and rapid twists in the style of short-form web dramas.
Story Style: Multi-route twists. Pacing: Fast-paced and satisfying.
Opening setup for the featured story 'Butler of the Hidden Realm': He is an ordinary butler in a modern metropolis, but his true identity is an agent of the 'Hidden Realm' Administration, responsible for dealing with anomalous creatures lurking in human society. When his wealthy employer is possessed by a demon, he must complete an invisible exorcism ritual between the tea party and the dinner banquet.
Please dive straight into this opening to give the player a strong sense of immersion and instant gratification; subsequent branches should maintain the twist density of a short drama, allowing players to see immediate consequences for every choice.
styleGuide: Urban fantasy concept art, vertical composition. A charismatic, handsome modern mage in a tailored suit, casting a glowing cyan spell that reveals a magical spiral staircase ascending into the rain-slicked city streets.
